title: H-1B visa delays force blind Indian student to miss his blind sister’s wedding, story goes viral
summary_full: Visually impaired Indian student Rajeev Krishna Annapragada missed his sister's wedding in India due to H-1B visa appointment delays.  His inability to secure a timely appointment forced him to choose between attending the significant family event and maintaining his professional stability in the US, highlighting the human cost of immigration backlogs.
